name: coda
description: Agent-native IDE built on Tauri 2 + SolidJS

scripts.typecheck: (cd packages/core && bun run typecheck) && (cd packages/ui && bun run typecheck) && (cd packages/app && bun run typecheck)
scripts.test: (cd packages/core && bun run test) && (cd packages/ui && bun run test) && (cd packages/app && bun run test)
